curator_task_rationale: Usable provenance, asset-level release evidence, and at least one paper-repository signal.
interpretation: Supports stronger attribution, artifact inspection, and preservation-selection workflows.

curator_task_rationale: Usable provenance plus code/recipe-or-stronger release evidence.
interpretation: Supports a practical curation workflow: the artifact can be grouped by upstream evidence and inspected through concrete procedural or asset evidence.

curator_task_rationale: Operational threshold plus at least one paper-repository signal.
interpretation: Tests whether adding bibliographic linkage changes the operational estimate; it changes one record in this corpus.

curator_task_rationale: Usable provenance, full/multi-asset recipe, and direct link evidence.
interpretation: Very strict condition for records closest to multi-asset preservation review; still not an execution test.

curator_task_rationale: At least one curation-relevant trace exists.
interpretation: Useful for search and follow-up, but insufficient for provenance-aware curation.
